name: python3-psycogreen
title: python3-psycogreen
description:
psycopg2 integration with coroutine libraries
This package enables "psycopg2" to work with coroutine libraries, using
asynchronous calls internally but offering a blocking interface so that
regular code can run unmodified.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-psycogreen because psycopg2 integration with coroutine libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-psycogreen as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-psycogreen with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-psycogreen --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
